COMPOST.summary: Compost is obtained by using the Composter, which needs 4000 Organic Matter to make each Compost, excluding Composter Upgrades. The following table gives the Organic Matter for all known compostable items. All Organic Matter values below are exact. For example, Potatoes are worth exactly 0.33 organic matter, not 1/3. Note that Condensed Fermento and Condensed Helianthus can only be used with sufficient Composter Upgrades because they are worth more than the default limit of 40,000 Organic Matter

DAVIDS_CLOAK.summary: David's Cloak be re-purchased from Rusty in case their original is lost

DCTR_SPACE_HELM.summary: A Space Helmet is rewarded to the player after completing a trade with the Spaceman on The Garden

DEAD_BUSH_OF_LOVE.summary: The Dead Bush of Love is a Special item. Players (Staff + Hypixel Player Council) who helped test Hypixel SkyBlock before its public release received this item as a token of gratitude. Only a few players were given this opportunity, which is why this item is extremely rare

DEAD_CAT_DETECTOR.summary: The Cat Detector can be claimed from a chest as part of Sad Jacquelle's quest

DEAD_CAT_FOOD.summary: Tasty Cat Food can be obtained by transferring a Dead Cat Food, which can be purchased from Barrier Street, from the Rift to the Hub

DEAD_PLANT.summary: A Dead Plant replaces plants in the Greenhouse if they reach -100 water. Alternatively, the decay mechanic will turn most fully grown mutation into Dead Plants after a few days, even if fully hydrated or placed by the player. Different mutations can have different decay timers. The lowest is 3 days, and certain mutations do not have any decay at all. This can be observed using the Plant Diagnostics Tool

DEAD_SEED.summary: A Dead Seed can be obtained by using Enchanted Bone Meal on a Dead Bush, including Red Thornleaf!Red Thornleaves on the Crimson Isle. The Enchanted Bone Meal will be consumed upon use

DEAN_LETTER_OF_RECOMMENDATION.summary: Infobox/Item The Letter of Recommendation is a Rare Quest Item. The Dean gives the player one after being given a Maddox Batphone

DEATH_BOW.summary: A Death Bow can be purchased from Ophelia's shop for 5m once The Catacombs - Floor VI is completed at least once

DECAYED_BAT.summary: A Decayed Bat has a 100% chance to drop from shooting a Bat, spawned from a Roofed Forest Island on the player's Private Island, with a Wither Bow using Icy Arrows

DECENT_AXE.summary: Shop Purchase: A Decent Axe can be purchased from Amaury. Name: Decent Axe; Ingredients: 1 Seriously Damaged Axe, 1000000 coins

DECENT_BOW.summary: A Decent Bow can be purchased from Gregory for 500 Coins. They appear in the Dragon's Nest during Ender Dragon fights and in Jerry's Workshop when a Reindrake spawns

DECENT_COFFEE.summary: The player can purchase a Decent Coffee for 5k from the Bartender

DECK_CHAIR.summary: Redeemable from seasonal Reward Bundles for ranked players

DEEP_SEA_ORB.summary: Dropped from Werewolves, Phantom Fishers and Grim Reapers

DEEPFRIES.summary: Farming: Deepfries have a 0.006% chance to drop when breaking mature Potatoes, a chance to drop from a Locust and a chance to drop from a Field Mouse while the Harvest Feast is ongoing and the crop is in season

DEFECTIVE_MONITOR.summary: Once obtained, it can be re-purchased from Unhinged Kloon for 1000

DEMONLORD_GAUNTLET.summary: Crafting: Requirements: Blaze Slayer 4; Ingredients: 192 Enchanted Rabbit Hide, 64 Enchanted Glowstone, 96 Molten Powder; Crafting recipe: Demonslayer Gauntlet

DERELICT_ASHE.summary: Inferno Demonlord: Derelict Ashe is obtained by killing the Inferno Demonlord and is a “token” drop for Blaze Slayer

DOJO_BROWN_BELT.summary: The Brown Belt is an Epic Belt. It is obtainable from Master Tao after reaching 6000 points in the Dojo. It gives +30 and +20. Its ability reduces all damage taken by 5%. This item is automatically Soulbound upon receiving it. It can be upgraded into the Black Belt, and is a direct upgrade from the Blue Belt

DOJO_GREEN_BELT.summary: The Green Belt is an Uncommon Belt. It is obtainable from Master Tao after reaching 2000 points in the Dojo. It gives +20 and +10. Its ability reduces all damage taken by 3%. This item is automatically Soulbound upon receiving it. It can be upgraded into the Blue Belt, and is a direct upgrade from the Yellow Belt

DOJO_WHITE_BELT.summary: Infobox/Item The White Belt is a Common Belt. It is obtainable from Master Tao as the first Dojo reward. It gives +10 and +5. Its ability reduces all damage taken by 0.5%. This item is automatically Soulbound upon receiving it

DOJO_YELLOW_BELT.summary: Infobox/Item The Yellow Belt is an Uncommon Belt. It is obtainable from Master Tao after reaching 1000 points in the Dojo. It gives +15 and +5. Its ability reduces all damage taken by 1%. This item is automatically Soulbound upon receiving it. It can be upgraded into the Green Belt, and is a direct upgrade from the White Belt

DOUBLE_ICE_CREAM_FLUX.page: Ice Cream Cone Power Orb Skin

DR_PAPER.summary: The player can purchase a Dctr. Paper for 4k from Shifty

DRAGON_CLAW.summary: Ender Dragon: Dragon Claw has 2% × number of Summoning Eye placed chance to be dropped after killing an Ender Dragon, with over 446 Dragon Weight

DRAGON_EGG.summary: This formerly glitched item is now unobtainable and blacklisted

DRAGON_NEST_PORTAL.summary: Combine Travel Scroll to Dragon's Nest with Portalizer in an Anvil

DRAGON_NEST_TRAVEL_SCROLL.summary: Unstable Dragon ; 35% chance; Requires at least 250 Dragon Weight

DRAGON_SHORTBOW.summary: A Dragon Shortbow has a chance of dropping from a Seer when the Lone Adventurer loses their Dragon Shortbow and the player has finished the Pearl Dealer questline

DRAGONFUSE_GLOVE.summary: Crafting: Ingredients: 4 Ritual Residue, 72 Mite Gel, 48 Absolute Ender Pearl; Crafting recipe: Dragonfuse Glove

DREAMSPIRE_TORCH.summary: The Dreamspire Torch is obtainable by talking to Hugh Pixel

DUECES_BUILDER_CLAY.summary: There were two ways for players to obtain the Builder's Clay:

DUNGEON_CHEST_KEY.summary: Dungeon Chest Keys can be found from secrets on Floor 4 of The Catacombs and above. The drop chance is 0.6%

DUNGEON_DISC_1.summary: The Dungeon Disc has a 2% chance to replace an Essence (Undead Essence and Wither Essence) drop in an Obsidian or Bedrock Dungeon Reward Chest

DUNGEON_DISC_2.summary: The Clown Disc has a 2% chance to replace an Essence (Undead Essence and Wither Essence) drop in an Obsidian or Bedrock Dungeon Reward Chest

DUNGEON_DISC_3.summary: The Watcher Disc has a 2% chance to replace an Essence (Undead Essence and Wither Essence) drop in an Obsidian or Bedrock Dungeon Reward Chest

DUNGEON_DISC_4.summary: The Old Disc has a 2% chance to replace an Essence (Undead Essence and Wither Essence) drop in an Obsidian or Bedrock Master Mode Dungeon Reward Chest

DUNGEON_DISC_5.summary: The Necron Disc has a 2% chance to replace an Essence (Undead Essence and Wither Essence) drop in an Obsidian or Bedrock Dungeon Reward Chest

DUNGEON_LORE_PAPER.summary: Journals can be found laying on the floor near some bodies in dungeon rooms. When picked up, they transform into the next Journal the player does not have. If the player has collected all entries, they will instead transform into a random entry

DUNGEON_STONE.summary: A Dungeon Orb is given by Mort on every Dungeon run of The Catacombs - Floor III and below if the player does not have a Dungeon Orb in their inventory. A Dungeon Orb may also be obtained by clicking in the bottom right of the class selection screen

DUNGEON_WIZARD_CRYSTAL.summary: Infobox/Item The Wizard's Crystal is a Rare Dungeon item that can be found in The Catacombs from Floor IV to Floor VII. Once found, players can give the Wizard's Crystal to the Wizard who is located in the same room. Upon giving him the crystal, the team gains 1 Blessing of Wisdom. Returning the crystal to the Wizard does not reward a secret

DUNGEONBREAKER.summary: A Dungeonbreaker is sold by Ophelia for 500 Wither Essence. It requires The Catacombs - Floor III completion to purchase and use

DUSKBLOOM.summary: A Duskbloom can grow in the Greenhouse if there are 2 Moonflower, 2 Shadevine, 2 Sunflower and 2 Dustgrain within 1 block of farmland

DUSTGRAIN.summary: A Dustgrain can grow in the Greenhouse if there are 2 Wheat within 1 block of farmland

DWARVEN_DIAMOND_AXE.summary: Infobox/Item Scavenged Iron Hammer Scavenged Items are Special items that have a 20% chance to be obtained from chests found using the Metal Detector in the Mines of Divan within the Crystal Hollows. Each item is given to their respective Keeper, and after all 4 have been given, the Jade Crystal can be obtained

DWARVEN_EMERALD_HAMMER.summary: Infobox/Item Scavenged Iron Hammer Scavenged Items are Special items that have a 20% chance to be obtained from chests found using the Metal Detector in the Mines of Divan within the Crystal Hollows. Each item is given to their respective Keeper, and after all 4 have been given, the Jade Crystal can be obtained

DWARVEN_GOLD_HAMMER.summary: Infobox/Item Scavenged Iron Hammer Scavenged Items are Special items that have a 20% chance to be obtained from chests found using the Metal Detector in the Mines of Divan within the Crystal Hollows. Each item is given to their respective Keeper, and after all 4 have been given, the Jade Crystal can be obtained

DWARVEN_IRON_HAMMER.summary: The Scavenged Iron Hammer can be obtained by combining a Scavenged Golden Hammer and Scavenged Emerald Hammer in an Anvil in the Gold Mine. It can only be obtained while the Tyashoi Alchemist is in the Hub. AnvilSB

DWARVEN_LAPIS_SWORD.summary: Infobox/Item Scavenged Iron Hammer Scavenged Items are Special items that have a 20% chance to be obtained from chests found using the Metal Detector in the Mines of Divan within the Crystal Hollows. Each item is given to their respective Keeper, and after all 4 have been given, the Jade Crystal can be obtained

DWARVEN_METAL_DETECTOR.summary: Keeper of Gold, Keeper of Emerald, Keeper of Diamond, Keeper of Lapis

DWARVEN_MINES_PORTAL.summary: Crafting: To craft a portal, the player must first unlock its recipe as a Collection reward. The recipe will always require 16 Ender Pearls in the middle and 16 of each specified items around it

DWARVEN_OS_BLOCK_BRAN.summary: 10% chance to drop when killing Scatha

DWARVEN_TANKARD.summary: To obtain the Dwarven Tankard, talk to one of the NPCs in the Dwarven Tavern and then type "burp" in the public chat (note: party chat, guild chat, and private chat will not work) - this will only be visible in chat to players who are also in the Dwarven Tavern area. A player can only receive one Dwarven Tankard

DWARVEN_TREASURE.summary: Dropped as a reward for participating in Dwarven Events

DYE_AQUAMARINE.summary: Aquamarine Dye has a variable chance to drop when killing Aquatic Sea Creatures. It cannot drop when Loot Sharing

DYE_ARCHFIEND.summary: An Archfiend Dye has a 0.015% (1/6,666) chance to be obtained by rolling an Archfiend Dice or a 0.15% (1/666) chance by rolling a High Class Archfiend Dice. Dye Drop Chance

DYE_BINGO_BLUE.summary: The player can purchase a Bingo Blue Dye from the shop at Bingo for 500 once the player has reached 3

DYE_BONE.summary: A Bone Dye has a 0.0000333% chance of dropping from most Skeleton-type mobs. Dye Drop Chance Drop Sources

DYE_BRICK_RED.summary: A Brick Red Dye can be obtained from killing any tier of the Tarantula Broodfather. The drop chance depends on what tier of the slayer boss is killed

DYE_BYZANTIUM.summary: A Byzantium Dye can be obtained from killing any tier of the Voidgloom Seraph. The drop chance depends on what tier of the slayer boss is killed

DYE_CARMINE.summary: Carmine Dye has a variable chance to drop when killing Magmatic Sea Creatures. It cannot drop when Loot Sharing

DYE_CELADON.summary: A Celadon Dye has a 1/10,000 chance of dropping when defeating Bacte. Additionally, it has a 1/100,000 chance of dropping when killing a Blobbercyst, which spawns after destroying one of Bacte's tentacles during the boss fight

DYE_CELESTE.summary: Celeste Dye has a chance to be obtained from defeating a Sven Packmaster. Slayer Tier: I; Chance: 1/10,000,000. Slayer Tier: II; Chance: 1/2,500,000. Slayer Tier: III; Chance: 1/1,000,000. Slayer Tier: IV; Chance: 1/500,000

DYE_CHOCOLATE.summary: The player can purchase one Chocolate Dye every SkyBlock Year from the Chocolate Shop for 40b, providing their Chocolate Factory is at least level 6

DYE_COPPER.summary: Copper Dye can be obtained by completing offers for Visitors on The Garden. The drop chance depends on the Rarity of the Visitor

DYE_CYCLAMEN.summary: A Cyclamen Dye has a variable chance of dropping from all mobs in the Crimson Isle. The mobs affected, and associated drop chances, are:

DYE_DARK_PURPLE.summary: A Dark Purple Dye has a base 1/400 or 0.25% chance of appearing in Rounds 1, 3, or 4 of the Dark Auction with a starting price of 20m

DYE_DUNG.summary: Dung Dye has a 0.0002% chance to be obtained when vacuuming any Pest on The Garden. 0.0002

DYE_EMERALD.summary: The player has a 1/5,000,000 chance of obtaining an Emerald Dye from mining Emerald Ore or Pure Emerald

DYE_FLAME.summary: A Flame Dye has a variable chance of dropping from defeating an Inferno Demonlord. Slayer Tier: I; Chance: 1/10,000,000. Slayer Tier: II; Chance: 1/2,500,000. Slayer Tier: III; Chance: 1/1,000,000. Slayer Tier: IV; Chance: 1/500,000

DYE_FOSSIL.summary: Fossil Dye has a 1/500,000 chance to be obtained from excavating a Suspicious Scrap. This chance can be increased by up to 10% from the Prehistorian perk in the Fossil Essence Shop

DYE_FROSTBITTEN.summary: Frostbitten Dye has a chance to be obtained from looting Frozen Corpses. Corpse Tier: Lapis; Chance: 1/250,000. Corpse Tier: Umber; Tungsten; Chance: 1/100,000. Corpse Tier: Vanguard; Chance: 1/10,000

DYE_HOLLY.summary: A Holly Dye has a base 0.0125% chance of appearing in a Red Gift. Both the gifting player and recipient receive the item

DYE_ICEBERG.summary: The Iceberg Dye can be obtained by killing Winter Sea Creatures. Dye Drop Chance

DYE_JADE.summary: Jade Dye has a 1/500,000 chance to be obtained from a Crystal Nucleus loot bundle

DYE_LIVID.summary: Livid Dye has a 1/5,000 chance of appearing in a Bedrock Chest after completing Master Mode Floor V

DYE_MANGO.summary: The player has a 0.00001% or a 1 in 10,000,000 chance of obtaining a Mango Dye from breaking any log type while in the public islandconfirm

DYE_MATCHA.summary: Matcha Dye has a chance to be obtained from defeating a Revenant Horror. Slayer Tier: I; Chance: 1/10,000,000. Slayer Tier: II; Chance: 1/2,500,000. Slayer Tier: III; Chance: 1/1,000,000. Slayer Tier: IV; Chance: 1/500,000. Slayer Tier: V; Chance: 1/250,000

DYE_MIDNIGHT.summary: Midnight Dye has a variable chance of dropping when killing Spooky Mobs

DYE_NADESHIKO.summary: The player has a variable chance of obtaining a Nadeshiko Dye by completing Superpairs in the Experimentation Table | 1/75,000 chance from Supreme Experiments: 1/50,000 chance from Transcendent Experiments. | 1/75,000 chance from Supreme Experiments: 1/25,000 chance from Metaphysical Experiments

DYE_NYANZA.summary: Nyanza Dye has a 1/250,000 chance of appearing as a reward from Commissions

DYE_PEARLESCENT.summary: A Pearlescent Dye has a variable chance of dropping from all mobs in The End. The mobs affected, and associated drop chances, are:

DYE_SECRET.summary: Secret Dye has a 1/1,000,000 chance to be obtained from Dungeon Secrets. Upon finding the dye, it will instantly be added to your inventory

DYE_SPOOKY.summary: Spooky Dye was obtainable from Taylor in the Fall 2025 Bundle. It could be purchased for 375 SkyBlock Gems

DYE_TREASURE.summary: Treasure Dye has a chance to be obtained from Fishing Treasure. Treasure Tier: GOOD; Chance: 1/1m. Treasure Tier: GREAT; Chance: 1/100k. Treasure Tier: OUTSTANDING; Chance: 1/10k

ESSENCE_CRIMSON.summary: Crimson Essence can be be obtained in the crimson isle in multiple ways: Opening chests from Kuudra runs. Salvaging certain items and items upgraded with Crimson Essence. Increasing Crimson Essence Gain: There are several sources that can be used to increase Crimson Essence gained: Icon: Rare Kuudra Pet; Name: Rare+ Kuudra Pet; Type: Pet; Effect: Gain +15%–20% more Crimson Essence. Icon: Epic Kuudra Pet. Icon: Legendary Kuudra Pet

ESSENCE_DIAMOND.summary: Diamond Essence can be be obtained in the dwarven mines, crystal hollows, and the Catacombs in multiple ways:

ESSENCE_DRAGON.summary: Dragon Essence can be be obtained in the end and the Catacombs in multiple ways: Sacrificing specific items to the Draconic Altar. Salvaging certain items and items upgraded with Dragon Essence. Trading with Tyzzo visitor in The Garden. Killing certain mobs: Drop Sources Increasing Dragon Essence Gain: There are several sources that can be used to increase Dragon Essence gained: Icon: Draconic Shard; Name: Essence of Dragons; Type: Attribute; Effect: Gain +1%–13% more Dragon Essence. Icon: Komodo Dragon Shard; Name: Echo of Essence. Icon: Tiamat Shard; Name: Echo of Echoes

ESSENCE_FOREST.summary: Forest Essence can be be obtained in galatea in multiple ways: Tree Gifts Starlyn Contests Salvaging certain items and items upgraded with Forest Essence. Increasing Forest Essence Gain: There are several sources that can be used to increase Forest Essence gained: Icon: Dreadwing Shard; Name: Essence of the Forest; Type: Attribute; Effect: Gain +1%–13% more Forest Essence. Icon: Komodo Dragon Shard; Name: Echo of Essence. Icon: Tiamat Shard; Name: Echo of Echoes

ESSENCE_FOSSIL.summary: Fossil Essence can be be obtained in the glacite tunnels and glacite mineshafts in multiple ways: Fossil Excavator Mining Fossils (which appear as Quartz blocks, stairs, and slabs) in Glacite Mineshafts, rewarding 4-8 each. Collecting Dr. Stone's rewards. Collecting Fossil Muncher's rewards. Salvaging certain items

ESSENCE_GOLD.summary: Gold Essence can be be obtained in the dwarven mines, crystal hollows, and the Catacombs in multiple ways: Opening Crystal Hollows Treasure Chests. Completing the Crystal Nucleus. Dungeon Secret Chests Killing Watcher Undeads with the Golden modifier in the Catacombs. Salvaging certain items and items upgraded with Gold Essence. Unlocking Golden Heads. Unlocking Marigold's Shop. Trading with Gold Forger and Marigold visitors in The Garden. Mob Drops: Drop Sources

ESSENCE_ICE.summary: Ice Essence can be be obtained in jerry's workshop and the Catacombs in multiple ways: Dungeon Secret Chests Salvaging certain items and items upgraded with Ice Essence.

ESSENCE_SPIDER.summary: Spider Essence can be be obtained in arachne's burrow and the Catacombs in multiple ways: Salvaging certain items and items upgraded with Spider Essence. Killing Arachne in arachne's burrow. Dungeon Secret Chests Trading with Spider Tamer visitor in The Garden. Mob Drops: Drop Sources Increasing Spider Essence Gain: There are several sources that can be used to increase Spider Essence gained: Icon: Arachne Shard; Name: Essence of Arthropods; Type: Attribute; Effect: Gain +1%–13% more Spider Essence. Icon: Komodo Dragon Shard; Name: Echo of Essence. Icon: Tiamat Shard; Name: Echo of Echoes

ESSENCE_SUN_GECKO.summary: Sun Gecko Essence can be obtained in the mountaintop by defeating Sun Gecko

Icon: Komodo Dragon Shard; Name: Echo of Essence. Icon: Tiamat Shard; Name: Echo of Echoes

FALLEN_STAR_HAT.summary: A Fallen Star Helmet can be obtained by talking to the Cult of the Fallen Star in their cave in the Cliffside Veins. The cult only appears between 12a.m. (Midnight, 00h, start of the 7th/14th/21st/28th day) until 6:00a.m. in in-game time every 7 SkyBlock days (7th, 14th, 21st, and 28th of each SkyBlock Month)

GLYPH_FORTIS.summary: The Fortis Glyph can be obtained after starting Sorcerer Okron's quest and imbueing the Validus Glyph, then opening the chest at -148.5 in the windmill within the Dreadfarm. Once given to Okron, it can no longer be obtained

GLYPH_PERNIMIUS.summary: The Pernimius Glyph can be obtained after starting Sorcerer Okron's quest and imbueing the Fortis Glyph, then opening the chest at -148.5 by the water tower within the Dreadfarm. Once given to Okron, it can no longer be obtained

GLYPH_POTENTIA.summary: The Potentia Glyph can be obtained after starting Sorcerer Okron's quest and imbuing the Robur Glyph, then opening the chest in a server room at -14.5 within the West Village. Once given to Okron, it can no longer be obtained

GLYPH_ROBUR.summary: The Robur Glyph can be obtained after starting Sorcerer Okron's quest and imbuing the Vis Glyph, then opening the chest at -93.5 on top of the Infested House's chimney. Once given to Okron, it can no longer be obtained

GLYPH_VALIDUS.summary: The Validus Glyph can be obtained by starting Sorcerer Okron's quest and then opening the chest at -95.5 by the pond in the West Village. Once given to Okron, it can no longer be obtained

GLYPH_VIS.summary: The Vis Glyph can be obtained after starting Sorcerer Okron's quest and imbuing the Conclamatus Glyph, then opening the chest at -99.5 by Joey McPizza and Chef within the West Village. Once given to Okron, it can no longer be obtained

INTIMIDATION_RING.summary: Purchase: The Intimidation Ring can be purchased from the Fear Mongerer, which is located on the Hub Island in the Event Stand during the Spooky Festival

IQ_POINT.summary: An IQ Point can be obtained by guessing the correct box from Ubik Von Neumann's minigame in The Mountaintop in The Rift

IRIDIUM.summary: Iridium has a InfoNeeded chance to drop from the extra drop pool from crops in the Greenhouse

IRON_AXE.summary: Huntaxes Farming Tools Infobox/Generic Axes are a category of tools. They are mostly used in Foraging to chop Trees and obtain Logs. Axes can also be used to damage Woodland mobs

IRON_BARDING.summary: Horse Armor was obtainable through the means of fishing when Hypixel SkyBlock was first released. This was patched after the first fishing update which removed vanilla fishing. The only way to acquire Horse Armor is through the Auction House

IRON_CHEST.summary: Crafted through Carpentry after reaching Carpentry 20

IRON_INGOT.summary: Mining (Gold Mine, Gunpowder Mines, Dwarven Mines, Crystal Hollows) Smelting Merchant stock

IRON_ORE.summary: Mined from ore blocks in mining areas; Silk Touch obtains ores that normally drop another material

IRON_PICKAXE.summary: Pickaxes are Mining tools used to obtain Ore and other rock-type blocks. How pickaxes behave can differ based on what Enchantments and Reforges are applied to it. Each pickaxe has its own Breaking Power

IRON_SPADE.summary: Shovels are used in Mining to obtain certain blocks such as Gravel and Dirt. Shovels can also be used for crafting Gravel Minion, Sand Minion, Mycelium Minion, and Red Sand Minion

IRON_SWORD.summary: The Iron Sword can be obtained by crafting it. Crafting: Ingredients: 2 Iron Ingot, 1 Stick; Crafting Recipe: Iron Sword

ISLAND_NPC.summary: Island NPC can be purchased from Amelia for 50000, once players are 5

LIVING_METAL.summary: Living Metal can be obtained by mining the Lapis Ore in the Living Cave using a Self-Recursive Pickaxe. After 1 block is mined, another will appear adjacent to the mined block. If the player continues to mine blocks, they will gain a multiplier on the amount of Living Metal they receive. Every 10 blocks mined increases the multiplier by 1, starting from 1x, up to 5x. 3 seconds after the player stops mining blocks, or when they reach 5x multiplier, it will be reset and the player will receive the Living Metal they mined. The player will receive 20x Living Metal at a 5x multiplier

The base drop chance is determined by the block's Breaking Power and is calculated as \frac{\text{Breaking Power}}{2000} per block. This can be increased by up to 10% by unlocking Refined Mind V from Doug

REFINED_MITHRIL.summary: Refined Mithril can be forged in The Forge once the player has reached Heart of the Mountain 2. It requires 160 Enchanted Mithril and 6 hours to forge

REFINED_TITANIUM_PICKAXE.summary: A Polished Titanium Pickaxe can be purchased from Bubu for 1x Titanium Pickaxe and 1x Refined Titanium once the player has reached Heart of the Mountain 4. The Titanium Pickaxe used to purchase a Polished Titanium Pickaxe will keep all of its modifiers

REFINED_TUNGSTEN.summary: Refined Tungsten can be forged once the player has reached Tungsten 3 and Heart of the Mountain 7. It requires 160 Enchanted Tungsten and 1 hour to forge

SMALL_WITCH_CAULDRON.summary: A Small Witch Witch Cauldron can be purchased from Agnes for 64 Spider Egg and 64 Funny Bone during the Year of the Witch

SMALL_XTREE.summary: Redeemable from seasonal Reward Bundles for ranked players

SMOLDERING_CHAMBERS_TRAVEL_SCROLL.summary: Crafting; Blaze Slayer 4 ; Travel Scroll to the Smoldering Tomb

SNOOZLING.summary: A Snoozling can grow in the Greenhouse if there are 4 Creambloom, 3 Dustgrain, 3 Witherbloom, 3 Duskbloom, and 3 Thornshade within 1 block of a 3x3 area of farmland

SNOW.summary: Snowballs can be obtained from fishing in the Jerry Pond, as well as from Snow Minions. You could also obtain them by using a Taiga Biome Stick, then using a Weather Stick to change the weather to rain, which would result in snow in the Taiga, which can then be harvested

SNOW_BLASTER.summary: Frosty the Snow Blaster can be purchased for 75000 by interacting with Sherry. It is initially empty

SNOW_BLOCK.summary: Fishing: 16 Snow Blocks have a chance to be obtained from Fishing on Jerry's Workshop

SNOW_CANNON.summary: Frosty the Snow Cannon can be obtained by talking to Frosty on Jerry's Workshop. More can be purchased for 1000 by interacting with Frosty without the original item in the player's inventory, or by using the command /opencannonbuymenu. It is initially completely filled with 1000 Snowballs

If the minion upgrade Soulflow Engine is used, the Raw Soulflow output of the upgrade is increased by 3% per minion level

WITHER_BLOOD.summary: Dropped from Dungeon Reward Chests on The Catacombs - Floor VII

WITHER_BOOTS.summary: Dungeon Reward Chests: Wither Armor can be obtained from Dungeon Reward Chests in The Catacombs - Floor VII. When obtained, it has a chance to have 1-5 Stars, Growth 6, Protection 6, and/or a Recombobulator 3000 applied

WITHER_BOW.summary: The Wither Bow can be bought from the Weaponsmith in the Weaponsmith for 250

WITHER_CATALYST.summary: Dungeon Reward Chests: A Wither Catalyst can be obtained from Dungeon Reward Chests in The Catacombs - Floor VII.

WITHER_CHESTPLATE.summary: Dungeon Reward Chests: Wither Armor can be obtained from Dungeon Reward Chests in The Catacombs - Floor VII. When obtained, it has a chance to have 1-5 Stars, Growth 6, Protection 6, and/or a Recombobulator 3000 applied

WITHER_CLOAK.summary: Dungeon Reward Chests: The Wither Cloak Sword can be obtained from Dungeon Reward Chests in The Catacombs - Floor VII.

WITHER_GOGGLES.summary: Wither Goggles can be purchased from Ophelia for 5,000,000 and 1 Shadow Goggles after completing The Catacombs - Floor VI

WITHER_HELMET.summary: Dungeon Reward Chests: Wither Armor can be obtained from Dungeon Reward Chests in The Catacombs - Floor VII. When obtained, it has a chance to have 1-5 Stars, Growth 6, Protection 6, and/or a Recombobulator 3000 applied

WITHER_LEGGINGS.summary: Dungeon Reward Chests: Wither Armor can be obtained from Dungeon Reward Chests in The Catacombs - Floor VII. When obtained, it has a chance to have 1-5 Stars, Growth 6, Protection 6, and/or a Recombobulator 3000 applied

WITHER_RELIC.summary: Crafting Recipe: Ingredients: 8 Wither Catalyst, 1 Wither Artifact; Crafting recipe: Wither Relic

WITHERBLOOM.summary: A Witherbloom can grow in the Greenhouse if there are 4 Dead Plant within 1 block of Soul Sand

WIZARD_BREADCRUMBS.summary: The Wizard's Breadcrumbs can be purchased by speaking to the Wizard But Weird in the Wizard Tower (Rift)

WIZARD_FACE.summary: A Wizard Face can be obtained by talking to Wizardman in the Wizardman Bureau while wearing W Logo, Wizardman Leggings, and Ugly Boots, which are crafted using fragments obtained by defeating Wizardman in their trials

WIZARD_PORTAL_MEMENTO.summary: A Piece of Wizard Portal is rewarded to the player once they contribute to the Repair Wizard Portal City Project at least 10 times. The player's name, along with the date it was obtained and edition number, will be displayed in the item's lore

WOLF_FUR_MIXIN.summary: Purchase: A Wolf Fur Mixin can be purchased from the Bartender for 150k once the player reaches Wolf Slayer VIII

WOLF_PAW.summary: The Wolf Paw is obtained by completing the Woods Race in 32 seconds or less, and then talking to Gustave

WOLF_RING.summary: Crafting: Ingredients: 14 Enchanted Bone, 1 Weak Wolf Catalyst, 1 Wolf Talisman; Recipe: Wolf Ring

WOLF_TOOTH.summary: Sven Packmaster: Wolf Teeth can be obtained from any tier of Sven Packmaster: I: 1-3 Wolf Tooth II: 9-18 Wolf Tooth III: 30-50 Wolf Tooth IV: 50-64 Wolf Tooth

WOOD_AXE.summary: Huntaxes Farming Tools Infobox/Generic Axes are a category of tools. They are mostly used in Foraging to chop Trees and obtain Logs. Axes can also be used to damage Woodland mobs

WOOD_CHEST.summary: Crafted through Carpentry after reaching Carpentry 20

WOOD_PICKAXE.summary: Pickaxes are Mining tools used to obtain Ore and other rock-type blocks. How pickaxes behave can differ based on what Enchantments and Reforges are applied to it. Each pickaxe has its own Breaking Power

WOOD_SPADE.summary: Shovels are used in Mining to obtain certain blocks such as Gravel and Dirt. Shovels can also be used for crafting Gravel Minion, Sand Minion, Mycelium Minion, and Red Sand Minion

WOOD_SWORD.summary: Wooden Sword can be purchased from Lumber Merchant for 5 or crafted. Crafting: Ingredients: 2 Planks, 1 Stick; Crafting recipe: Wooden Sword

WOOD_TALISMAN.summary: Crafting: Requirements: Oak Log 7; Ingredients: 8 Oak Leaves, 1 Enchanted Oak Log; Crafting recipe: Wood Affinity Talisman

WOODCUTTING_CRYSTAL.summary: Crafting: Requirements: Spruce Log VII; Ingredients: 96 Enchanted Spruce Log, 1 Enchanted Nether Quartz; Crafting recipe: Woodcutting Crystal

WOODEN_BAIT.summary: Wooden Bait can be purchased from Rosemary for 100 Forest Essence

WORM_BAIT.summary: Crafting: Ingredients: 1 Worm Membrane, 1 Clay Ball; Crafting Recipe: Worm Bait

WORM_THE_FISH.summary: Worm the Fish has a 0.5% chance to be fished up when fishing in Dirt with a Dirt Rod

WRAPPED_GIFT_FOR_JULIETTE.summary: Romero and Juliette Quest Items are quest items obtained from Romero and Juliette quest. Players have to obtain them from Romero by bringing him the correct items, and then bring the quest items to Juliette for rewards

WREATH.summary: Redeemable from seasonal Reward Bundles for ranked players

WRIGGLING_LARVA.summary: A Wriggling Larva has a 0.5% chance to drop from Moths when slain

FREE_WILL_REFUND.summary: Previously granted as compensation to players whose minions lost Free Will

KUUDRA_SHOP_ITEM.summary: Infobox/Item Remote Perk Shop is a Special item purchasable from Kuudra Perk Shop for 100000. As the name suggests, it allows the player to access the Perk Shop remotely. It stays with the player after the Kuudra run is over

MONSTER_EGG.summary: Spawn Eggs were obtained from the Bazaar exploit that allowed players to obtain Bazaar UI items. With this glitch, Super Enchanted Eggs were able to be dropped on the ground and picked up as a vanilla item form
